name: Venn — Omics Integration (3-circle overlap)
input: Create a Venn diagram showing omics data integration: Genomics (DNA variants, GWAS hits), Transcriptomics (gene expression, splicing), Proteomics (protein abundance, post-translational modifications). Overlaps: Genomics+Transcriptomics (eQTLs), Transcriptomics+Proteomics (ribosome profiling), All three (systems biology).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: 3-circle Venn with labeled overlapping regions for omics integration.

data.title: Multi-Omics Data Integration

items.label: Genomics
items.description: DNA variants, GWAS hits, structural variations

items.label: Transcriptomics
items.description: Gene expression levels, alternative splicing, eQTLs

data.caption: Integration of genomics, transcriptomics, and proteomics for systems biology
